properties.name: demo_site
properties.description: Illustrative ~900 ha AOI within the Prey Lang region, Cambodia, centred on a documented 2021-2023 deforestation hotspot at ~105.875E, 13.075N. This is NOT a surveyed project boundary - it is a representative box chosen to demonstrate the forest-change pipeline with real loss data. See docs/limitations.md.
properties.reference_point: 13.075 N, 105.875 E (Prey Lang region deforestation hotspot)
